steps.title: Fit the two given points
steps.content: Since the line passes through $(0,9)$ and $(1,17)$, Desmos can find the equation immediately. Enter those two points and run a linear regression.

steps.title: Read the equation
steps.content: The regression gives $m=8$ and $b=9$, so the line is $$y=8x+9.$$ The point $(0,9)$ gives the intercept, and the jump from 9 to 17 over one unit gives slope 8.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Only choice D, $y=8x+9$, has slope 8 and $y$-intercept 9. Choice D is correct.
